title: Remove and install engine oil pressure switch

blocks.text: Remove and install engine oil pressure switch
Disconnect the coupler (A). Remove the oil pressure switch (B).
Remove old fluid packings, oil, and dirt from oil pressure switch threads and bolt holes.
Apply Honda Genuine Fluid Packing 1216E to the threaded flange side half of the oil pressure switch and install the oil pressure switch (A). Connect the coupler (B).

items: If the liquid packing is left on for more than 4 minutes after application, do not install it as it is. Remove the packing once and reapply.
Oil should be injected at least 30 minutes after installation.
Do not touch the liquid packing-applied surface.
The engine should be started at least 3 hours after installation.
